name: devops
trigger_condition: Task involves Docker, deployment, CI/CD, or infrastructure
description: DevOps skills: Dockerfile creation, docker-compose config, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), environment management, health check configuration, deployment scripts, infrastructure as code (Terraform, etc.).
expected_output: Working Docker configs, deployment scripts, CI pipelines
known_limitations: Cannot deploy to external environments; Docker daemon must be running locally
